text: Good morning! Can you pull up today's calendar and reminders?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Wednesday, December 04. You have sprint planning at 10 AM, and Ethan's soccer practice at 4 PM.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Quick update: Ethan is working on a school assignment at the table. He is asking lots of questions about exoplanet atmospheric compositions. He is growing up so fast.
title: Kids School Update

text: Got it, Mike. That's wonderful. That's a great interest. I can summarize the atmosphere of Venus in a kid-friendly way. I'll update the calendar reminder.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Just had a quick look at the CareConnect backlog. Greg Holloway wants to drop patient onboarding to save time, but Anika thinks it is essential. Greg is not going to like this, but we have to push back.
title: Work Update

text: Logged that. Let's break this down. I suggest a phased rollout. Shipping a basic version of patient onboarding now and iterating later is a good compromise. Let's verify this in the staging environment first.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Just wanted to mention that reviewing my sleep tracker logs. I ran 5 miles but my knee felt tight. Feeling good about my routine.
title: Health Update

text: Sure thing! I've logged your vitals. Great run! Remember to stretch your hamstrings to help the knee. Keep stretching that knee!
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Quick update: Planning for future education costs. The refi quote saves us about $250 a month. Every bit of savings helps.
title: Finance Update

text: Logged that. Refinancing is a great leverage point. That's $3,000 annually. It could cover the Colorado trip or 529 plans. Let me know when you want to execute.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Lily had a tough time at bedtime tonight. Ethan and Marcus Nguyen are playing in our backyard. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Got it, Mike. Toddlers are full of energy. Playdates are great for Ethan. I can add snack shopping to the Target list. Let's keep tracking what works.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick update: Soldering custom sensors in the garage. I aligned it and tracked Jupiter's moons. Nice to combine space science and coding.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Interesting. Space science and tech is a great focus. Jupiter tracking is a classic target! I've saved the coordinate parameters. I'll monitor the API alerts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick update: Just had a quick look at the CareConnect backlog. Our Twilio integration is throwing 429 rate limit errors during signups. Let's see if we can optimize the code first.
title: Work Update

text: Understood. I checked the recent logs for that. We should implement a queue-based message broker to buffer SMS delivery rather than hitting Twilio directly. Let's monitor the error rates over the next sprint.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Ethan is working on a school assignment at the table. He is stuck on a math word problem involving division. It is great to see him so engaged.
title: Kids School Update

text: Understood. Great update. Try using visual diagrams to explain remainders. He'll get it quickly. I'll update the calendar reminder.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Jarvis, Reflecting on my job transition from MedFuture Systems to Vertex Health. Saying goodbye to my old colleagues in Chicago on my last day at MedFuture Systems. Greg is not going to like this, but we have to push back.
title: Work Update

text: Understood. That is a common bottleneck. It's important to keep in touch with old colleagues; they are a great professional network. I'll keep tracking the API performance.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Took Lily to her medical checkup. I hit 18 miles of running this week. Health has to be a priority.
title: Health Update

text: Got it, Mike. That's good medical feedback. Great progress! The consistent stretching is keeping you stable. I'll save the mileage logs.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Sarah and I are looking at home listings in Frisco online. We are comparing school districts in Frisco to find the best neighborhood. Will talk this over with Sarah.
title: Finance Update

text: I've compiled the spreadsheet numbers. Liberty Elementary has excellent reviews. The neighborhood near it is highly recommended. I'll update the budget sheet.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Ethan and Lily are playing with Cooper in the backyard. Cooper had a small accident on the living room rug during crate training. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Interesting. Toddlers are full of energy. Puppy training takes patience. Try using positive reinforcement and regular outdoor breaks. I've updated the grocery list.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick log: Spent hours calibrating the telescope mount. I quantized a local LLM to run in memory. Love going down these rabbit holes.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Logged that. I've indexed the research notes. Quantizing 70B models is heavy coding. I've saved settings in your scratchpad. I can pull more research papers.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Jarvis, Reflecting on my job transition from MedFuture Systems to Vertex Health. The database query on the patient onboarding schema is running very slow. We need to back this up with solid performance metrics.
title: Work Update

text: Got it, Mike. Here is what I recommend. I recommend analyzing the query execution plan to see if a compound index can speed up patient onboarding. I can add this optimization to the backlog.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Hey Jarvis, logging my evening reflection. Busy day at Vertex Health. CareConnect prep is moving along. Ethan did great with his school homework. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Logged that for you. See you in the morning, Mike.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
